proposal.hypothesis: Parametric variant of breakout archetype breakout_donchian_adx

variants.builder_text:
FICHE_STRATEGIE v1
id: breakout_donchian_adx
archetype: breakout_donchian_adx
family: breakout
timeframe: 1h
side: both
indicators:
  - donchian(period=15)
  - adx(period=16)
  - atr(period=14)
entry:
  - long: close > donchian.upper and adx.adx > 35
  - short: close < donchian.lower and adx.adx > 35
exit:
  - condition: close crosses donchian.middle or adx.adx < 25
risk:
  stop_atr_mult: 2.25
  tp_atr_mult: 3.5
  description: ATR stop-loss (2.25x) and take-profit (3.5x)
constraints:
  - no_lookahead: true
  - only_registry_indicators: true
